name: repo-preflight
description: Check GitHub repositories before installing or running them locally.

interface.longDescription: Repo Preflight adds a conservative install-risk workflow and MCP scanner for checking public GitHub repositories before you install, run, or add them as MCP servers with local credentials nearby.
defaultPrompt: Check this GitHub repo before I install it.
Review this MCP server repo before I add it.
Scan this repo for install-time risk.
